name: Black Bean and Papaya Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cooled or canned black beans
2 Ripe papayas; peeled, seeded and diced small
1 tbsp Minced red or green chile pepper of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine all the ingredients.
2. Mix together well.
3. This salsa will keep, covered and refrigerated, 4 to 5 days.
4. Makes about 5 cups.
5. This Caribbean-inspired salsa from 'Salsas, Sambals, Chutneys & ChowChows' is great with grilled fish, it is also very good by itself, as a spicy summer-salad-type course.
